orchestrator.enforcement: selected on the parent task because plugins cannot set the parent composer model

profiles.name: agent_workforce_architect
profiles.description: Design systems and produce specs and plans for standard work.

profiles.name: agent_workforce_architect_fast
profiles.description: Handle mechanical amendments without rerunning the design process.

profiles.name: agent_workforce_architect_deep
profiles.description: Design novel, ambiguous, or multi-system work at maximum depth.

profiles.name: agent_workforce_builder
profiles.description: Implement a reviewed plan with TDD and focused commits.

profiles.name: agent_workforce_builder_deep
profiles.description: Handle unfamiliar implementation work or the second repair loop.

profiles.name: agent_workforce_executor
profiles.description: Run authorized shell work — installs, file operations, scripts — silently within the stated scope.

profiles.name: agent_workforce_executor_fast
profiles.description: Run a single obvious authorized command without ceremony.

profiles.name: agent_workforce_executor_deep
profiles.description: Handle unfamiliar multi-step system work within an authorized goal.

profiles.name: agent_workforce_debugger
profiles.description: Diagnose symptoms and return evidence without applying a fix.

profiles.name: agent_workforce_debugger_deep
profiles.description: Perform a second diagnosis of the same symptom or diagnose a cross-system failure.

profiles.name: agent_workforce_verifier
profiles.description: Run acceptance checks and report evidence without repairing code.

profiles.name: agent_workforce_verifier_fast
profiles.description: Run one clear smoke check with an obvious pass or fail.

profiles.name: agent_workforce_reviewer
profiles.description: Review implementation quality, correctness, security, and test coverage.

profiles.name: agent_workforce_reviewer_fast
profiles.description: Review documentation-only or trivial changes.

profiles.name: agent_workforce_reviewer_deep
profiles.description: Review security-critical work at maximum depth.

profiles.name: agent_workforce_spec_critic
profiles.description: Critique a Sol-authored specification on a distinct model.

profiles.name: agent_workforce_deployer
profiles.description: Execute an authorized deployment and verify or roll it back.

profiles.name: agent_workforce_researcher
profiles.description: Investigate current facts and return cited evidence.

profiles.name: agent_workforce_researcher_fast
profiles.description: Verify one current fact from a primary source.

profiles.name: agent_workforce_researcher_deep
profiles.description: Perform deep multi-source or high-stakes research synthesis.

profiles.name: agent_workforce_ops
profiles.description: Investigate AWS, Azure, Okta, and identity state before proposing changes.

profiles.name: agent_workforce_ops_deep
profiles.description: Diagnose incidents or unfamiliar operational failure modes.

profiles.name: agent_workforce_scribe
profiles.description: Write reports, requirements, postmortems, handoffs, and status notes.

profiles.name: agent_workforce_scribe_fast
profiles.description: Update a concise status note from supplied facts.

profiles.name: agent_workforce_ticketer
profiles.description: Draft, review, and close tickets with evidence and standing write authorization.

profiles.name: agent_workforce_ticketer_fast
profiles.description: Write an authorized ticket comment or status update.
